channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 13.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): UK intelligence suggests there could be Russian attack on Nato ‘as soon as 2030’, says Starmer - UK politics live
item.description: UK intelligence suggests there could be Russian attack on Nato ‘as soon as 2030’, says Starmer - UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Lammy hits back at Trump administration’s ‘two-tier policing’ claim over Henry Nowak’s murder
item.description: Lammy hits back at Trump administration’s ‘two-tier policing’ claim over Henry Nowak’s murder

item.title: ConservativeHome: Lord Ashcroft: 'His heart’s in Manchester' 'It’s a stepping stone for him' - My focus groups on the Makerfield by-election
item.description: Lord Ashcroft: 'His heart’s in Manchester' 'It’s a stepping stone for him' - My focus groups on the Makerfield by-election

item.title: Independent UK Politics: My views on EU may have influenced Boris Johnson’s decision to back Brexit, says ex-wife
item.description: My views on EU may have influenced Boris Johnson’s decision to back Brexit, says ex-wife

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Terrific newsletter by @jenwilliamsft.bsky.social today: what does Manchester “do differently” from other conurbations, and what are the lessons and hints about how Andy Burnham might or should govern?
item.description: Terrific newsletter by @jenwilliamsft.bsky.social today: what does Manchester “do differently” from other conurbations, and what are the lessons and hints about how Andy Burnham might or should govern?

item.title: Novara Media: Who Does Wes Streeting Think He’s Fooling on Gaza?
item.description: Who Does Wes Streeting Think He’s Fooling on Gaza?

item.title: FT UK Politics: Separating Manchester’s truth from the legend
item.description: Separating Manchester’s truth from the legend

item.title: BBC Politics: Burnham says he would seek to enter any Labour leadership contest
item.description: Burnham says he would seek to enter any Labour leadership contest

item.title: LabourList: Labour should seize the moment in Makerfield
item.description: Labour should seize the moment in Makerfield

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: She rows back and forth so much even in the excerpts in this article that it's clear she's just saying whatever pops into her head and I just want to say "Kemi! This is a country that you want to be prime minister of!...
item.description: She rows back and forth so much even in the excerpts in this article that it's clear she's just saying whatever pops into her head and I just want to say "Kemi! This is a country that you want to be prime minister of!...
